Fresh, Local, Quality Food

Welcome to Fullys Fresh Food! Enjoy our delicious, locally-sourced dishes made fresh daily.

About us


At Fullys Fresh Food, it’s all about good food and friendly faces. What started as a small, family-run business has grown over time, expanding while still holding onto the same values it was built on. With a real passion for quality produce, the shop brings together fresh, high-quality meats with a tasty range of deli favourites and homemade options. Proud to be part of the Middlesbrough community, Fullys Fresh Food continues to grow whilst keeping that personal, local touch—where customers are always welcomed, served with a smile, and can count on great food they can trust every time.

See what others are saying about us!

Amazing atmosphere! Really friendly staff and delicious food! I will definitely be coming back and recommending this place to my friends!

J. Wilson

Friendly staff and great food! Nothing beats this place for quality and price. Unfortunately, I can't seem to find a parking spot nearby.

T. Smith

This place is welcoming and the food was delicious, however, I didn't appreciate the wait time on my lunch break. Should have more staff during this time.

A. Johnson

I ordered one of the new Sunday roasts and it was brilliant! All the comfort of eating a full roast with none of the cooking time. Clean up was a breeze too!

S. Taylor

The food was fantastic! My only criticism would be that there was a mistake in my order. I asked for ketchup but got brown sauce instead.

J. Burke

Really great service, I came in to get a sandwich and it was delicious, I then got talked into buying one of the freshly made scotch eggs, It's made with bacon!

L. Crighton

Our Services

Cafe

Enjoy our beverages and fresh food in a cosy atmosphere. Indoor and outdoor seating is available.

Go somewhere
Deli

Freshly cooked meats and other sandwich fillers. A wide selection of salads to match any preference.

Go somewhere
Bakery

Freshly baked bread, pies and other savoury items made daily with the finest ingredients.

Go somewhere
Butchers

High-quality, locally sourced meats and poultry, expertly cut and prepared for your enjoyment or cut to order.

Go somewhere

New Sunday roast

Introducing our new Sunday Roast! Available every Sunday from 11am to 3pm, our Sunday Roast is the perfect way to enjoy a delicious, home-cooked meal without the hassle of cooking yourself. Made with locally sourced ingredients and cooked to perfection, our Sunday roast is sure to satisfy your cravings and leave you feeling satisfied. Whether you're looking for a hearty meal to share with family or a comforting dish to enjoy on your own, our Sunday Roast is the perfect choice. Don't miss out on this delicious new offering - come in and try it today or order for delivery!


Disclaimer: Please note that this is a new service and for the time being is only available for delivery via phone orders. This will change in the future.
